findings.description: A hierarchical flowchart diagram is missing, and its text content is rendered as an unstructured list.
findings.evidence: In the PDF (Page 4), a flowchart diagram uses boxes and connecting lines to illustrate the hierarchical relationships between different database Record Types (e.g., Record Type 1 linking to Record Type 2). In the HTML, the visual structure is entirely missing. The text from inside the diagram boxes is instead rendered as a simple vertical column, completely losing the critical relational context the diagram provided.

findings.description: A flowchart diagram illustrating the hierarchical relationships between record types is missing from the HTML.
findings.evidence: On Page 4 of the source PDF, Appendix B contains a visual flowchart connecting the various Record Types (e.g., lines connecting 'Environmental Data Record Type 1' to 'Replicate Data Record Type 2'). The HTML completely omits this diagram (no tag) and instead just dumps the text from inside the diagram boxes as disconnected paragraphs, causing a loss of the visual relationship information.
